description: Chat Context Window - Implement conversation memory so the chat maintains context across messages. Currently each message is sent independently with no history. This update will send the full conversation history to the API, enabling follow-up questions and natural dialogue.

userStories.title: Update chat API to accept conversation history
userStories.description: As a user, I want the chat to remember what we discussed so I can ask follow-up questions.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify POST /api/chat to accept a 'messages' array parameter instead of just 'message'
The 'messages' array should contain objects with { role: 'user' | 'assistant', content: string }
Maintain backward compatibility: if only 'message' is provided (no 'messages' array), treat it as a single-message conversation
Include all conversation history messages in the OpenAI API call after the system prompt
Preserve the existing system prompt with article context
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Backend foundation - must be done first

userStories.title: Update chat frontend to send conversation history
userStories.description: As a user, I want my chat messages to be sent with the full conversation history.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify sendMessage function in chat/page.tsx to send the full messages array
Format messages for the API: map the local Message[] to { role, content }[] format
Include the new user message in the history before sending
Ensure the messages state continues to work correctly for UI rendering
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Connects frontend to the updated API

userStories.title: Add conversation context indicator to chat UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see that the chat has context of our conversation.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a subtle indicator showing the number of messages in the current conversation
Display this in the chat header or input area (e.g., '5 messages in conversation')
Style consistently with the existing design system using CSS variables
Update the count when new messages are added
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Visual feedback that context is being maintained

userStories.title: Add clear conversation button
userStories.description: As a user, I want to be able to start a fresh conversation without the previous context.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a 'Clear conversation' or 'New conversation' button to the chat interface
Place the button in the header area, styled as a secondary/ghost button
Clicking the button clears the messages array and resets to the empty state
Only show the button when there are messages in the conversation
Style consistently with the design system
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Allows users to reset context when needed

userStories.title: Handle token limit for long conversations
userStories.description: As a user, I want the chat to gracefully handle very long conversations without errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Estimate total token count of conversation history before sending to API
If conversation exceeds a safe limit (e.g., 6000 tokens for conversation history), truncate older messages
Keep the system prompt and most recent messages when truncating
Add a helper function to estimate conversation token count
Log a warning when truncation occurs
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Prevents API errors from context that's too long. GPT-4o has 128k context but we want to leave room for the system prompt with articles and the response.
